items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 16: Conversation 16. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?
• 6- Do you eat popcorn at the movies? / candy / chocolate
• 4- I have money

items.text: Do you prefer to speak English or Spanish?

items.prompt: I prefer to speak English. I don’t speak Spanish.
options: Spanish? or English speak to prefer you Do
